title: Media Resources
subtitle: Core CUCM media services used during call processing

items.title: Transcoder
items.desc: Converts between incompatible codecs such as G.711 and G.729.

items.title: Conference Bridge
items.desc: Enables multi-party audio conferencing between endpoints.

items.title: Music on Hold
items.desc: Streams audio to callers placed on hold.

items.title: Annunciator
items.desc: Plays prerecorded system announcements and prompts.

items.title: MTP
items.desc: Media Termination Point for SIP and H.323 interoperability.
